notes: BG 2.57 supports chapter 2's thesis. Specifically: third — third behavioral mark; cross-verse coherence with 2.38 (sukha-duḥkhe same kṛtvā) and 2.48 (samatvaṁ yoga ucyate) explicitly cited. The verse anchors in the chapter's third thread (sthita-prajña / seasoned-operator state) per the chapter-thesis statement, and the engineering layer preserves the chapter's didactic voice. Verses are ordered to build progressively from 2.54's question through 2.55-2.59's first descriptive marks.
